ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch of the software */,
  "expected_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the release */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* Actual date of the release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release manager */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special instructions */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the release */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of the release (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_release_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_manager_id") REFERENCES release_managers ("release_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., 19, 19.1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the branch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the branch */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the branch is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_managers" (
  "release_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the release manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the release manager */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the release manager belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release manager was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release manager's information */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the release manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the note belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the release note */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the release note was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the release note */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release note */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release note is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release candidate */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the candidate belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release candidate */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the release candidate was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the release candidate */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the release candidate */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release candidate */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release candidate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_candidates_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_candidates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the task belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Person or team the task is assigned to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tracking" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the issue belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Person or team the issue is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, release manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions the user has (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access control entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
